name: astartis-control-plane
description: A local, policy-aware security control plane for Codex developers.

interface.shortDescription: Investigate Zero Trust events and verify secure fixes.
interface.longDescription: Astartis Control Plane gives Codex a safe, local interface to Astartis NAC, Zero Trust, agent health, audit evidence, and Proof Mode.
defaultPrompt: Investigate the current Astartis security posture.
Simulate a non-compliant eGov device admission.
Run Astartis Proof Mode and explain the evidence.
